title: trifolium dolopium
intro: Trifolium dolopium, also known as the dolomitic clover or dolomite clover, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium dolopium include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Trifolium dolopium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
